tracks.rawText: 1:42recording-1768046581050UploadA spoken word piece with a male vocalist delivering a rap-like performance over a sparse, atmospheric instrumental, The vocal delivery is clear and rhythmic, with a consistent mid-range pitch, The instrumental background features a sustained, low-frequency synth pad creating a dark and melancholic atmosphere, There are no discernible chord progressions or melodic lines from instruments, The tempo is slow and consistent, driven by the vocal rhythm rather than a percussive beat, The production is clean, with the vocals prominent in the mix and the synth pad providing a subtle, continuous bed of sound, There are no obvious effects on the vocals or the instrumental track4PublishRemix
tracks.title: recording-1768046581050
